title: Education
description: Educational materials, courses, and case studies for students and professionals in food safety.

foodSafety.title: Food Safety Management
foodSafety.description: A comprehensive course on food safety management systems: HACCP, ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, and other international standards.

riskManagement.title: Risk Management
riskManagement.description: Methods for identifying, assessing, and controlling risks in food production.
